events.text: Identified the condition as a missing output/load reactor on a long VFD-to-motor lead run — a manufacturer-instruction/NEC 110.3(B) compliance issue (via NEC 430 motor circuit context) that risks reflected-wave overvoltage, insulation stress, and bearing damage.
